anxiety-carts-horses.description: Confidence and optimism do not come from success. It's the other way around.

basic-advice.description: Establish and maintain effective working habits: pay attention, stay healthy, and be persistent. Keep a regular routine where you get plenty of sleep, do the most important thing first every morning, and set plans for tomorrow each evening.
basic-advice.share_description: Establish effective habits: pay attention, stay healthy, be persistent. Get there by maintaining a routine, prioritizing sleep, tackling important tasks first, and planning for tomorrow.
